name: PropertyElement.PropertyElementType.MergedMarkPropertyElementTypes
summary: The MergedMarkPropertyElementTypes class represents the available property element types for merged marks.

methods.name: BlockPrefix
methods.summary: Returns the block prefix property element type.

methods.name: DistancesBetweenGroups
methods.summary: Returns the distances between groups property element type.

methods.name: SingleMarkContent
methods.summary: Returns the single mark content property element type.

methods.name: SymbolSeparatingBlocksInMarks
methods.summary: Returns the symbol separating blocks in marks property element type.
